##NAMES=Ternesite
##RRUFFID=R140779
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_5_(SiO_4_)_2_(SO_4_)
##LOCALITY=Caspar quarry, Bellerberg volcano, Ettringen, Mayen, Eifel, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Green massive, associated with black-brown jasmundite, small black grains of srebodolskite, hydroxylellestadite, ettringite and portlandite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140779
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.846 b: 15.365 c: 10.157 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 1068.5 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
